channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16031] replay-single test_90: failed with 5
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Alexander Boyko

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/2dc35347-200f-4876-83c1-5eb402ed09f2

test_90 failed with the following error:

/mnt/lustre/d90.replay-single/all
/mnt/lustre/d90.replay-single/f1
Failover ost2 to trevis-104vm3
CMD: trevis-104vm3 hostname
CMD: trevis-104vm3 lsmod | grep zfs >&/dev/null || modprobe zfs;
			zpool list -H lustre-ost2 >/dev/null 2>&1 ||
			zpool import -f -o cachefile=none -o failmode=panic -d /dev/lvm-Role_OSS lustre-ost2
CMD: trevis-104vm3 zfs get -H -o value 						lustre:svname lustre-ost2/ost2
Starting ost2: -o localrecov  lustre-ost2/ost2 /mnt/lustre-ost2
CMD: trevis-104vm3 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-ost2; mount -t lustre -o localrecov  lustre-ost2/ost2 /mnt/lustre-ost2
CMD: trevis-104vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n health_check
CMD: trevis-104vm3 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config bash rpc.sh set_default_debug \"vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck\" \"all\" 4 
trevis-104vm3: trevis-104vm3.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all 4
CMD: trevis-104vm3 zfs get -H -o value 				lustre:svname lustre-ost2/ost2 2>/dev/null | 				grep -E ':[a-zA-Z]{3}[0-9]{4}'
pdsh@trevis-104vm1: trevis-104vm3: ssh exited with exit code 1
CMD: trevis-104vm3 zfs get -H -o value lustre:svname 		                           lustre-ost2/ost2 2>/dev/null
Started lustre-OST0001
pdsh@trevis-104vm1: trevis-104vm1: ssh exited with exit code 5
 replay-single test_90: @@@@@@ FAIL: test_90 failed with 5

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
replay-single test_90 - test_90 failed with 5

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
